STEP 939 — Deep Collatz Sub-class Descent Theorems
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  n%1024 and n%4096 within the "hard" residues n%256∈{71,103,167,231}.

    B. n%1024=999  (base=231, K=16, 3^6/2^10 = 729/1024 ≈ 0.712)
